title: Abromeitiella lorentziana
taxonomy: Abromeitiella lorentziana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This family is a group of monocots commonly known as the pineapple family, which includes over 57 genera and 3,000 species. The genus Abromeitiella is a small group of epiphytic plants, native to the Andes mountain range in South America. Abromeitiella lorentziana is a succulent plant with rosettes of fleshy leaves, typically found in the wild in the high-altitude regions of Argentina and Chile. As a member of the Bromeliaceae family, Abromeitiella lorentziana shares characteristics with other pineapple family members, such as CAM photosynthesis.
